segments.text: he formed grasshoppers in the beginning of the shooting up of the latter growth; and, lo, it was the latter growth after the king's mowings
segments.speaker: The LORD GOD

segments.text: when they had made an end of eating the grass of the land
forgive, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? for he is small
segments.speaker: Amos

footnotes: by…: or, who of (or, for,) Jacob shall stand?

segments.text: It shall not be
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: the Lord GOD called to contend by fire, and it devoured the great deep, and did eat up a part
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: cease, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? for he is small
segments.speaker: Amos

footnotes: by…: or, who of (or, for,) Jacob shall stand?

segments.text: This also shall not be
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: the Lord stood upon a wall made by a plumbline, with a plumbline in his hand
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Amos, what seest thou?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: A plumbline
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Behold, I will set a plumbline in the midst of my people Israel: I will not again pass by them any more
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: the high places of Isaac shall be desolate, and the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste; and I will rise against the house of Jeroboam with the sword
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Amos hath conspired against thee in the midst of the house of Israel: the land is not able to bear all his words
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Jeroboam shall die by the sword, and Israel shall surely be led away captive out of their own land
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: O thou seer, go, flee thee away into the land of Judah, and there eat bread, and prophesy there
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: But prophesy not again any more at Beth-el: for it is the king's chapel, and it is the king's court
segments.speaker: Amaziah

footnotes: king's court: Heb. house of the kingdom

segments.text: I was no prophet, neither was I a prophet's son; but I was an herdman, and a gatherer of sycomore fruit
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Go, prophesy unto my people Israel
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Thou sayest, Prophesy not against Israel, and drop not thy word against the house of Isaac
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Thy wife shall be an harlot in the city, and thy sons and thy daughters shall fall by the sword, and thy land shall be divided by line; and thou shalt die in a polluted land: and Israel shall surely go into captivity forth of his land
segments.speaker: The LORD
